per_item.question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal'
  AND "Number of arms" >= 3
  AND "Type of control" = 'Chemo'
  AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%multikinase inhibitor%' OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%multikinase inhibitor%';
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

per_item.question: Show trials of CTLA-4 for non-small cell lung cancer that began in 2018 or later?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clincal setting in relation to surgery",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria",
  "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion",
  "Type of follow-up given",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control arm",

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Year" >= 2018;

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND ("Cancer type" LIKE '%Gastric%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%GEJ%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%Gastric cancer%')
  AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE '%PD-1%')
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up'
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

per_item.question: Which non-small cell lung cancer studies tested combinations of immune checkpoint inhibitors and chemotherapy, and what were the primary endpoints?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clincal setting in relation to surgery",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria",
  "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion",
  "Type of follow-up given",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control arm",
  "Clinical setting",
  "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE
  "Cancer type" LIKE 'Non-small cell lung cancer%'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND ("Type of combination" IS NOT NULL)
  AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%chemotherapy%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%')
  AND ("Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL)
  AND ("Primary endpoint" IS NOT NULL)
  AND ("Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication' OR "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up')
  AND ("Class of ICI" IS NOT NULL)
  AND ("Type of therapy" = 'Combination')
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql:

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'NSCLC' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+Chemo';

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" ILIKE '%Bladder%'
  AND "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%Atezolizumab%'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND "Type of combination" IS NOT NULL
  AND ("Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Atezolizumab%' OR "Class of ICI" ILIKE '%PD-L1%')
;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",

  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",

  "Type of follow-up given",

  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",

per_item.question: Which trials of Nivolumab and Ipilimumab in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer used Chemo as the control?

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%')
  AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%')

per_item.question: Which Multiple Myeloma trials used neoadjuvant immune checkpoint inhibitors?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM "clinical_trials"
WHERE "Cancer type" LIKE '%Myeloma%' AND ("Clincal setting in relation to surgery" LIKE '%Neoadjuvant%' OR "Clinical setting" LIKE '%Neoadjuvant%')
  AND ("Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL OR "Class of ICI" IS NOT NULL)
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%ICI%' 
;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Monotherapy/combination", "Trial phase", "Name of ICI"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND "Clinical setting in relation to surgery" = 'Clinical setting in relation to surgery';

per_item.question: Which Non-Small Cell Lung cancer trials had 4 or more arms and used Chemotherapy as a control?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clincal setting in relation to surgery",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria",
  "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion",
  "Type of follow-up given",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control arm",
  "Clinical setting",
  "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE
  "Cancer type" LIKE '%Non-Small Cell Lung%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%NSCLC%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%Lung%' 
  AND "Number of arms" >= 4
  AND "Control regimen" LIKE '%Chemo%'
  AND "Type of control" = 'Chemo';
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Number of arms" >= 4 AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: What phase 3 trials for Mesothelioma compared chemotherapy to a combination of BRAF and MEK inhibitors?

FROM clinical_trials

  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma'

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" LIKE '%Head and neck%' 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4')
  AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'Yes' 
  AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" IN ('Yes', 'No')
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication' 
  AND "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1, CTLA-4' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'Yes';

per_item.question: Which trials for Melanoma used chemotherapy as the control arm?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clincal setting in relation to surgery",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria",
  "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion",
  "Type of follow-up given",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control arm",

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: What were the primary endpoints for Melanoma studies that tested combinations of immune checkpoint inhibitors with other immune checkpoint inhibitors?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma'
  AND ("Type of combination" LIKE '%ICI+%' AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%') 
  AND ("Class of ICI" LIKE 'PD-L1, CTLA-4' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE 'PD1, CTLA-4' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE 'PD-L1' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE 'PD1')

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" LIKE '%Urothelial%' 
  AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" <> 'Yes'
  AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" IN ('Yes', 'No')
;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Cancer type", "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';

per_item.question: Find Head and Neck cancer trials using PD-L1 where PD-L1 positivity was required for participation?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" LIKE '%Head and neck%' 
  AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'Yes'

per_item.question: List trials using PD1 that reported composite or co-primary endpoints?

per_item.question: Find trials for breast cancer patients who received at least 2 prior treatments using a combination of therapies?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast'
  AND "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%prior%' 
  AND "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%2%'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND "Treatment regimen" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Clincal setting in relation to surgery" IN ('Metastatic+recurrent (unresectable)', 'Relapsed/refractory', 'Maintenance')

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND ("Type of therapy" LIKE '%Radiation%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Radiation%' OR "Type of combination" LIKE '%Radiation%')
  AND "Primary endpoint" IS NOT NULL
  AND ("Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" IS NOT NULL)
  ;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+RadiatICIn';

per_item.question: Which clinical trials for renal cell cancer used TKI as a control and involved both Nivolumab and Ipilimumab?

SELECT

    "Year",
    "Trial phase",

    "Total sample size",
    "Originial publication or Follow-up",
    "Cancer type",
    "Treatment regimen",
    "Name of ICI",
    "Class of ICI",
    "Monotherapy/combination",
    "Type of combination",

    "Primary endpoint",
    "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",

    "Type of follow-up given",
    "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
    "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
    "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
    "Type of therapy",
    "Control arm",
    "Clinical setting",

    AND ("Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%')
    AND "Control regimen" ILIKE '%TKI%' 
    AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
;

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab, Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Control arm" = 'TKI';

per_item.question: Show trials of PD-1 and CTLA-4 combination immunotherapy for renal cell cancer that began in 2018 or later?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" ILIKE '%Renal cell%' 
  AND "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%PD-1%' 
  AND "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Atezolizumab%' 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD1','PD-L1') 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND ("Year" >= 2018)
  AND "Clincal setting in relation to surgery" IN ('Metastatic+recurrent (unresectable)', 'Relapsed/refractory', 'Maintenance', 'Neoadjuvant', 'Adjuvant')
  AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1, CTLA-4' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4'
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql:

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE ("Cancer type" LIKE '%gastric%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%Gastroesophageal%')
  AND "Type of control" = 'Placebo'
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication'
  AND "Control regimen" IS NOT NULL;

per_item.question: List trials for renal cell cancer that do not require PD-L1 as a biomarker for inclusion?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" ILIKE '%Renal%' 
  AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" NOT IN ('Yes')
  AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" IN ('Yes','No')
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy')
ORDER BY "Year" ASC, "NCT" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Cancer type", "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM "clinical_trials"
WHERE "Cancer type" LIKE '%Pancreatic%' 
  AND ("Type of combination" LIKE '%vaccine%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%vaccine%')
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination') 
;

per_item.question: Find Non-Small Cell Lung cancer trials that included at least 2 prior treatments and used a combination of therapies?

per_item.question: What are the regimens for Phase 3 combination PD-1 and CTLA-4 checkpoint inhibitor trials in Renal cell cancer?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Year" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND ("Class of ICI" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%PD-1%')
  AND ("Class of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%')
  AND "Cancer type" = 'Renal' OR "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' OR "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell carcinoma'

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

per_item.question: Which Melanoma trials had 4 or more arms and used BRAFi and MEKi as the control treatment?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clincal setting in relation to surgery",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria",
  "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion",
  "Type of follow-up given",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control arm",
  "Clinical setting",
  "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE
  "Cancer type" ILIKE '%Melanoma%'
  AND "Number of arms" >= 4
  AND (
    "Control regimen" ILIKE '%BRAFi%' OR
    "Control regimen" LIKE '%BRAF inhibitor%' OR
    "Control regimen" ILIKE '%BRFi%' OR
    "Name of ICI" IS NULL
  )
  AND (
    "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%BRAFi%' OR
    "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%MEKi%' OR
    "Type of therapy" = 'Combination'
  )
ORDER BY "Year" ASC, "Total sample size" DESC;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Number of arms" >= 2 AND "Control arm" = 'BRAFi+MEKi';

per_item.question: Find studies of renal cell cancer included in a meta-analysis that used both PD1 and CTLA-4 agents?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell cancer'
  AND ("Class of ICI" = 'PD1' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%')
  AND ("Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" IN ('Co-primary', 'Multiple', 'Dual, unspecified') OR "Primary endpoint" IS NOT NULL)
  AND ("Name of ICI" IN ('Nivolumab', 'Pembrolizumab', 'Atezolizumab', 'Durvalumab', 'Cemiplimab') OR "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4'))
  AND (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
       FROM (
         SELECT DISTINCT "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials t2
         WHERE t2."NCT" = clinical_trials."NCT"
       ) AS sub) > 0
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Included in MA", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND "Included in MA" = 'Yes';

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Atezolizumab%'
  AND "Cancer type" LIKE '%Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%NSCLC%'
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up'
;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

per_item.question: Find Phase 3 trials of Nivolumab for Head and Neck cancer that are follow-up publications?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Nivolumab%'
  AND "Cancer type" LIKE '%Head and Neck%'
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up'
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

per_item.question: List the trials for PD-L1 that reported multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"

per_item.question: For Urothelial cancer trials reporting median follow-up, what are the follow-up durations in months for each treatment arm?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS "Overall Follow-up (months)",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" AS "Rx Follow-up (months)",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" AS "Control Follow-up (months)"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial'
  AND "Type of follow-up given" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" IS NOT NULL;

per_item.question: Find Hodgkin Lymphoma trials using PD1 that did not require PD-L1 positivity for inclusion?

per_item.question: Which phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared radiation to immunotherapy and chemotherapy plus anti-EGFR therapy?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT *
FROM "clinical_trials"
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Cancer type" = 'Prostate'
  AND (
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%radiation%' OR
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Radiation%'
      )
  AND (
        "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL OR
        "Class of ICI" IS NOT NULL
      )
  AND (
        "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR
        "Type of combination" IS NOT NULL
      )
  AND (
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%immunotherapy%' OR
        "ICIs" LIKE '%immunotherapy%'
      )
  AND (
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%anti-EGFR%' OR
        "Type of combination" LIKE '%anti-EGFR%' OR
        "Control regimen" LIKE '%anti-EGFR%'
      )
;

  AND ("Class of ICI" = 'PD1' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%')

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma'
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%antibody-drug conjugate%' ESCAPE '\'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy'
  AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Control regimen" IS NOT NULL
  AND ("Type of control" = 'Placebo' OR "Type of control" = 'Chemo' OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Antibody-drug conjugate%')
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma' AND "Control arm" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';

per_item.question: List trials for Mesothelioma that do not require PD-L1 as a biomarker for inclusion?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials

per_item.question: Show trials for renal cell carcinoma using PD-1 or CTLA-4 inhibitors that began in 2018 or later?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell carcinoma'
  AND ("Name of ICI" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE 'PD1' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE 'CTLA-4')
  AND "Year" >= 2018
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination')
;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Year" >= 2018;

per_item.question: Show the author and original publication or follow-up for renal cell cancer trials using PD-1 and CTLA-4 inhibitors that began in 2018 or later?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell cancer' 
  AND ("Class of ICI" = 'PD1' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1, CTLA-4' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%PD-1%')
  AND "Year" >= 2018
;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND "Year" >= 2018;

per_item.question: Show trials of PD-1 and CTLA-4 combination immunotherapy for renal cell cancer that began in 2008 or later?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" ILIKE '%Renal cell%' 
  AND ("Class of ICI" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%PD-1%') 
  AND ("Class of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%')
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination')
  AND "Year" >= 2008
  AND ("Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%PD-1%' OR "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%PD-1% CTLA-4%')
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" IN ('Original publication', 'Follow-up')
ORDER BY "Year" ASC, "NCT" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND "Year" >= 2008;

per_item.question: For bladder cancer trials, what is the median follow-up time in months?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT MEDIAN(COALESCE("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", NULL)) AS "Median Follow-up (Overall)"
FROM "clinical_trials"
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder'

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'urothelial' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND "Type of therapy" LIKE '%ICI%'
  AND "Type of combination" NOT LIKE '%Placebo%' 
  AND "Control regimen" IN ('Anti-VEGF', 'Bevacizumab', 'VEGF inhibitors', 'Aflibercept')
;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

per_item.question: Find phase 2 trials comparing immunotherapy to anti-VEGF therapy for urothelial cancer?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE ("Cancer type" ILIKE '%Urothelial%' OR "Cancer type" ILIKE '%Bladder%')
  AND ("Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%immune%' OR "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Atezolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Durvalumab%')

  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
ORDER BY "Year" DESC;

per_item.question: For colorectal cancer trials, what is the median follow-up duration in months by treatment arm?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  AVG("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall") AS "Overall_Median_FollowUp_Months",
  AVG("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx") AS "Rx_Median_FollowUp_Months",
  AVG("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control") AS "Control_Median_FollowUp_Months"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';

per_item.question: Show trials of PD-1 and CTLA-4 combination immunotherapy for renal cell cancer that began in 2018 or later?

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM "clinical_trials"
WHERE "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Cemiplimab%'
  AND ("Cancer type" ILIKE '%Urothelial%')
  AND ("Name of ICI" = 'Cemiplimab')
  AND ("Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up')
  AND (CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS NUMERIC) > 21)
  AND ("Type of therapy" = 'Monotherapy' OR "Type of therapy" = 'Combination')
  AND ("Type of follow-up given" ILIKE '%Median%')
  AND ("Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%Durvalumab%' OR "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%Tremelimumab%')
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

per_item.question: Show trials for Renal cell cancer using PD1 and CTLA-4 where PD‑L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion?

SELECT

  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal'
  AND ("Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD1', 'PD1, CTLA-4', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4') 
       OR "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL)
  AND ("Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'Yes')
  AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%PD-1 inhibitor%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%CTLA-4%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Atezolizumab%')
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy')
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4';

per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"

  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD-L1')

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" IN ('Gastric', 'Gastric Cancer', 'Gastric or GEJ cancer', 'GEJ Cancer')
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND "Type of combination" LIKE '%vaccine%'
  AND "Primary endpoint" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+Chemo';

per_item.question: Which studies of gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer tested combinations of immunotherapy and chemotherapy, and who authored them?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"

WHERE ("Cancer type" LIKE '%Gastric%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%Gastroesophageal%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%GEJ%')

per_item.question: List trials of Tremelimumab for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer with overall follow-up exceeding 21 months?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"

per_item.question: List the trials for PD-L1 or CTLA-4 that used co-primary endpoints, including the trial identifier, author, year, class of immune checkpoint inhibitor, name of the immune checkpoint inhibitor, and primary endpoint?

  "Year",

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Cancer type" LIKE '%Hepatocellular carcinoma%'
  AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%'
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication'
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

per_item.question: Which phase 3 bladder cancer trials compared chemotherapy to an immune checkpoint inhibitor?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clincal setting in relation to surgery",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria",
  "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion",
  "Type of follow-up given",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control arm",
  "Clinical setting",
  "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials

  );

per_item.question: Which bladder cancer trials in phase 3 compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy?

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Class of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%' 
  OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%'
  OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%CTLA-4%'
  AND "Cancer type" LIKE '%Prostate%'
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy');
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4';

per_item.question: Show the year and cancer type for CTLA-4 trials treating prostate cancer that began in 2018 or later?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "Year", "Cancer type"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4'
  AND "Cancer type" = 'Prostate'
  AND "Year" >= 2018;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Year", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Year" >= 2018;

per_item.question: For Urothelial cancer trials, what is the median follow-up duration in months for each treatment arm?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "Treatment regimen",
  AVG(("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" + "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" + "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control") / 3.0) AS "Overall_Rx_Control_Avg_FollowUp_Months"
FROM
  "clinical_trials"
WHERE
  "Cancer type" ILIKE 'Urothelial%'
  AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  "Treatment regimen";
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Year", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE 
  "Cancer type" IN ('Gastric', 'Gastroesophageal junction') AND
  ("Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%ipilimumab%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%') AND
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ' AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

per_item.question: Which phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared radiation to immunotherapy?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND ("Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%radiation%' OR "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%radiation therapy%' OR "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%RT%')
  AND ("Type of therapy" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination')
  AND ("Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL OR "Class of ICI" IS NOT NULL)
  AND ("Comparison" IS NULL OR LOWSECT("Control regimen") IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;

SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM "clinical_trials"
WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication'
  AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Durvalumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Durvalumab%')
  AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Tremelimumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Tremelimumab%')
  AND "Cancer type" LIKE '%Pancreatic%'
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

per_item.question: Find Melanoma trials with minimum follow-up and show the follow-up duration in months for the control arm?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" ILIKE '%Melanoma%'
  AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" DESC
LIMIT 100

per_item.question: Which studies of Urothelial cancer tested combinations of immune checkpoint inhibitors and chemotherapy, and who authored them?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Number of arms",
  "Total sample size",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clincal setting in relation to surgery",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?",
  "Secondary endpoint",
  "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria",
  "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion",
  "Type of follow-up given",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control arm",
  "Clinical setting",
